metadata.name: Schedule a Home Visit for a Case

description: A social worker needs to schedule a required monthly home visit with a client.

nodes.task_description: Identify the client and their case.

expected_outcome.value: The worker pulls up the correct case file.

nodes.task_description: Contact the client to coordinate a suitable date and time for the visit.

expected_outcome.value: The worker and client agree on a time for the home visit.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the visit in the case management system and the worker's calendar.

expected_outcome.value: The worker successfully books the appointment in the system.
